cleavage agent: digestion was performed at 37 °C with 10 μL of freshly prepared trypsin (Promega)
collision energy: fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation HCD at 27% NCE
fragmentation method: fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation HCD
instrument: LC-ESI-MS/MS was performed on a Q-Exactive HF Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer
labeling: Quantitative analysis of the experiments was performed by two different investigators to minimize subjective bias.
